fields.summary: Specifies color primaries as defined by ITU-T H.273 (CICP) for use when creating color spaces.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

Specifies the color primaries of a color space as defined by ITU-T H.273 (CICP). These values are used with <see cref="M:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp,SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp)" /> to create a standard color space.

## Examples

```csharp
// Create an sRGB-like color space using Rec.709 primaries
var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(
    SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec709,
    SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Rec709);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Color primaries corresponding to ITU-T H.273 value 22 (EG 432-1 / Display P3).
ITU-R BT.2020 / BT.2100 color primaries for ultra-high-definition content.
ITU-R BT.470 System B/G color primaries (used in PAL/SECAM).
ITU-R BT.470 System M color primaries (used in NTSC).
ITU-R BT.601 color primaries for standard-definition video.
ITU-R BT.709 color primaries used for sRGB and high-definition video.
SMPTE EG 432-1 color primaries (P3 D65, used for Display P3).
SMPTE RP 431-2 color primaries (P3 DCI, used for digital cinema).
SMPTE ST 240M color primaries for early HDTV systems.
SMPTE ST 428-1 color primaries for digital cinema (XYZ).
